prompt: Create a high-resolution UI mockup of a web application dashboard shown inside a single large rounded-rectangle window centered on a very light bluish gray canvas, with a soft drop shadow and a faint oversized thumbs-up outline watermark on the right side of the background. Inside the main container, render a white top navigation bar: on the left place a compact logo block with a tiny abstract emblem of three horizontally stacked overlapping rounded bars in blue, green, and teal and dark gray brand name text; in the center add a horizontally elongated pill-shaped search bar with very light gray fill, a dark gray magnifying glass icon on the left, and light gray placeholder text; on the right align exactly three small white circular or rounded-square icon buttons each with thin dark gray line icons (a single square, overlapping rectangles, and a simple grid), all drawn with fine strokes. Along the far left side, create a vertical sidebar on slightly off-white background separated from the main content by a hairline light gray divider: include four main navigation rows with small muted line icons and dark gray sans-serif labels, where the third item is selected and shown on a pale blue rounded pill background with bolder text and accompanied by a narrow vertical blue accent bar running along the extreme left edge; below add a subsection title in tiny uppercase gray text and four funnel-step items, each with a tiny solid circular color swatch (blue, teal, purple, pink) to the left of the label; at the very bottom add a profile area with a small circular avatar placeholder and two stacked lines of gray user name text on slightly darker off-white. In the primary content area behind the modal, draw a row of four tall rounded-rectangle funnel-stage cards: the first has a coral red header and white body, the second a pale yellow header, the third a lavender purple header, and the fourth is mostly white with a pale magenta circular icon containing a plus sign; each card shows a bold centered title, a smaller line indicating a number of tactics, and a small circular icon in the top-left corner of the colored area, all using clean dark gray sans-serif text; beneath them, partially obscure several smaller white tactic cards with rounded corners, thin light gray borders, tiny drop shadows, star rating rows, and colored chips. Overlapping the center of these cards, place a large foreground modal: a pure-white rounded rectangle about two-thirds the width of the main container and roughly half its height, with a slightly stronger, soft drop shadow; internally divide it into a left column occupying two-thirds of the modal and a right column occupying one-third. At the top of the modal’s content area, center a horizontally elongated pill-shaped tab strip with a white fill and subtle light gray outline that contains exactly three evenly spaced labels, each a small gray sans-serif word preceded by a tiny solid colored circle in coral red, pale yellow, and lavender purple respectively, with the left label styled as active in a slightly darker or bolder weight. Immediately below this strip, in the left column, place a large bold dark gray sans-serif heading spanning two lines reading like a promotional tutorial title; underneath add a line of smaller gray hashtag-style phrases separated by spaces, followed by a compact rating row showing five small star icons in black or dark gray, a numeric rating value, and a short piece of blue hyperlink text. Directly below, include a horizontal row of at least four small parameter tags describing budget, difficulty, and effect, each tag being a tiny pill-shaped rounded rectangle with white fill, thin light gray border, small sans-serif label text, occasional pale blue line icons, and certain keywords such as “YES” or “Easy” in darker or bolder text. Fill the central portion of the left column with several lines of regular-weight dark gray body copy in a clean sans-serif font, left-aligned with comfortable line spacing, resembling a description of a marketing plan; near the bottom of this text column, add a horizontal strip of four preview thumbnails with slight rounded corners and subtle shadows: three small colorful mini-interface screenshots to the left and one slightly larger rectangular video-style thumbnail toward the right that shows a darker blurred background image with a semi-transparent white circular play icon centered on it. In the right column of the modal, draw a vertical panel with light gray background, rounded corners only on the outer right side, and a thin inner white margin; at its top-right corner place a small blue text link labeled “Expand all” in regular-weight sans-serif. Inside this panel create a stacked numbered list of seven steps: each step row is a full-width white rounded rectangle with a thin very light gray divider separating it from the next, starting with a small circular number badge containing the step number in medium dark gray, followed by a solid colored circular social-media-style icon in blue or pink with a white symbol, and then a dark gray sans-serif title such as “Paid post” or “Organic long video”; at the far right of each row include a small gray chevron icon indicating expand or collapse. Make exactly the fourth row appear expanded by using a slightly tinted very pale background for the row and rendering, beneath its main line, a block of fine gray descriptive text divided into two narrow columns separated by a thin vertical divider line, with small bold gray labels like “Parameters” followed by smaller regular text describing formats and sizes. At the bottom of the modal, create a slim horizontal footer area: on the left place an author-credit group with a small circular avatar placeholder and two lines of gray name and role text; on the right align three action buttons with fully rounded pill shapes and equal heights—first an outlined “Back” button with white fill, thin light gray border, dark gray sans-serif label, and a small left-pointing arrow icon before the text; second a flat “Edit” control as a simple white button or text with medium gray label and no border; and third a primary call-to-action button that is wider than the others, filled with saturated medium blue, containing bold white sans-serif text such as “Add to my funnel” and no visible border. Finally, add along the outer right edge of the modal a single small white circular button with a thin light gray border, a right-pointing dark gray triangular arrow icon in its center, and a tiny drop shadow, positioned vertically centered to suggest carousel navigation within the dashboard interface.

prompt: Create a tall vertical flyer that looks like a smartphone screen centered on a solid very light gray background; the phone screen is a white rounded rectangle with a soft gray shadow and has a narrow slightly darker off-white status bar at the very top containing only the time “9:30” in small black sans-serif text on the left and a tiny solid black camera hole dot in the center. Below this, design the hero area on a warm off-white background: on the left, place the label text “COOKING WORKSHOP” in small uppercase light brown sans-serif characters with wide letter spacing; beneath it, write the words “Japanese” and “Sushi Roll” in two lines of large, irregular brush-style script in bright red, with a slightly hand-painted look and staggered baselines. Under the script title, add a short left-aligned English description paragraph in medium-weight dark gray sans-serif text inviting users to learn how to make sushi rolls with a cooking school. Immediately below this paragraph, center a wide red call-to-action price button: a horizontal rounded rectangle with rough, painterly edges, filled with solid bright red and containing the text “Only Rp 200.000” in bold white uppercase sans-serif centered inside. Directly beneath it, add a second button: a smooth black pill-shaped rounded rectangle with solid fill and centered white bold sans-serif text reading “Join the Workshop!”. To the right of this hero text, place a realistic, high-resolution rectangular photo of assorted sushi on a light wooden board with pieces of green garnishes, white rice, orange fish, and pink ginger, shot at a slight angle; behind this photo, add a slightly larger circular orange-red paint splash with irregular watercolor-style edges, so the sushi board overlaps the front of the circle, creating a layered effect. Below the hero area, change the background to pure white using an irregular wavy torn-paper-style horizontal edge to separate it from the off-white above. On this white background, first show a full-width left-aligned English paragraph in small dark gray regular sans-serif font explaining that participants will learn ingredient selection, rolling techniques, plating, and sales-ready presentation in one day. Under that, add a learning outcomes section: title it “What you will learn:” where the words “What you will” are dark gray and the word “learn:” is bright red, all in bold sans-serif; beneath, list exactly seven bullet points in a single left-aligned column, each bullet composed of a small thin red circle containing a red checkmark followed by a single line of dark gray sans-serif text describing specific skills such as professional rolling, ingredient selection, authentic recipes, plating tips, direct practice, and receiving materials and certificates. Toward the lower left area of this section, overlay a badge that consists of an orange-red painted circle with rough edges and, on top of its center, a rectangular photo of a person in a white apron preparing sushi on a light wooden table, the photo partially extending outside the circle to create a medallion look; ensure the circle’s color matches the bright orange-red used in the hero paint splash and buttons. On the right side of the screen, starting near the top, place an instructor information card on a very pale beige background: the card is a white rounded rectangle with a soft drop shadow, extending most of the right column width. Inside this card, align text on the left and a circular photo on the right; the heading consists of two lines reading “Taught by Sushi Master” and “Chef [Instructor Name]” in bold dark reddish-brown sans-serif. Beneath the heading, include three horizontal bullet lines, each starting with a small solid orange-red circle containing a white checkmark icon followed by a short dark gray sans-serif sentence about the instructor’s years of experience, specialty in authentic sushi, and patience with beginners. To the right of this text column, place a circular photo of the instructor wearing a white chef uniform, centered vertically within the card. Below this instructor card, still on a white background, add a section titled “Who is this workshop for?” in centered bold dark red sans-serif text; under the heading, arrange exactly three evenly spaced rounded-rectangle photo cards in a horizontal row, each with a thin light gray border and a subtle shadow. In each card, show a vertical photo of people in a bright kitchen environment preparing sushi at counters, and overlay a solid orange-red rectangular label bar across the entire bottom of each card with centered white sans-serif text describing the audience segment, such as culinary business owners, home cooks or employees, and beginners who want to learn to make sushi. Further down, create a wide cream-colored rounded rectangle card that spans most of the screen width and explain reasons to join; at its top left corner, place the heading “Why should you join?” in bold dark red sans-serif. Directly under the heading, add two horizontally aligned pill-shaped tags: the left tag is white with a thin orange-red outline and contains centered orange-red sans-serif text reading “Buy at restaurant,” while the right tag is solid orange-red with centered white sans-serif text reading “Make it yourself”; position the right tag slightly overlapping or adjacent to the left tag to contrast options. Below these tags toward the center, include two small rectangular photos of sushi sets on plates, each with a tiny bright red rounded rectangle price tag at its corner displaying values like “100rb” and “170rb” in small white sans-serif numbers. On the right side of this cream card, place a vertical column of three main bullet point benefits: “Save money,” “Can sell,” and “Lifetime skill,” each in bold dark gray sans-serif with smaller regular dark gray explanatory lines underneath, and each bullet preceded by a tiny orange-red circular icon. Under this section, insert a full-width horizontal divider band: a short bright red rectangle spanning the entire screen width and filled with a seamless darker red repeating semicircular wave pattern reminiscent of traditional Japanese seigaiha, forming rows of evenly spaced overlapping arcs. Finally, at the bottom of the screen, add a centered white rounded-rectangle event details card on a slightly pale peach-tinted background area; give it a subtle shadow. At the top of this card, place the heading “Limited Spots!” in bold dark red sans-serif and center it. Beneath, create a horizontal row of three event details, each composed of a small solid red circle containing a simple white line icon (calendar, clock, and map pin respectively) followed by dark gray sans-serif text giving the date “Sunday, 20 April 2025,” the time “16:00 – 18:00,” and the location “[Cooking School Name].” At the bottom of this card, add a row of four equal-sized countdown boxes aligned horizontally: each box is a small upright rounded rectangle with a thin red border, a very light background, a large centered red two-digit number (for example “04,” “15,” “52,” “54”), and a tiny gray uppercase label such as “Days,” “Hours,” “Minutes,” and “Seconds” positioned just below or inside each box, ensuring all typography remains clean sans-serif and colors consistently use dark gray for body text, bright orange-red for accents and buttons, and dark red for headings.

prompt: Create a high-resolution desktop website landing page mockup for a skincare and dermatology clinic, designed in a clean modern style on a very pale blush pink background with soft circular gradients placed in the top-right and bottom-left corners. At the very top, add a full-width thin horizontal info bar with a light peach-pink fill and centered small dark gray sans-serif text that reads Welcome To Dr. Nakhoda Skin Institute. Directly under it place a main navigation bar: a white full-width horizontal rectangle with generous side padding. On the left of this nav bar, include a compact logo consisting of a dark gray circular monogram icon followed by the words Graphivy Studio in dark gray sans-serif text, with Graphivy in bold weight and Studio in lighter weight. In the center of the nav bar, evenly space six small dark gray menu links in regular-weight sans-serif font reading Home, About Us, Treatments, Pharmacy, Gallery, and one more short item, all in sentence case with no underlines. On the right side of the nav bar, add a rounded rectangular button with a solid medium warm pink fill containing a simple white phone icon on the left and two lines of white sans-serif text on the right, the top line bold reading Call Us Now and the bottom line a smaller phone number. Below the navigation, design a hero section as a full-width horizontal band with a light pastel pink background. Inside this hero band, create a two-column layout: on the left column stack text and a call-to-action, and on the right column place product imagery and a vertical photo panel. In the left hero column, add a large bold dark gray sans-serif heading reading Dr. Nakhoda Skin Institute, beneath it a smaller regular-weight dark gray paragraph in two lines explaining that the clinic removes spots, lightens wrinkles, and rescues pore size simultaneously, and under the paragraph place a medium-size pill-shaped call-to-action button filled with solid medium pink and containing centered white sans-serif text Explore Our Services. In the right hero column, arrange a cosmetic product still life composed of a pink-tinted glass dropper bottle standing upright, a small stack of smooth beige spa stones near its base, and an orange-pink rose, all resting on a neutral surface against the same light pink background, and at the far right edge of the hero band align a tall vertical rounded rectangle filled with a soft pink gradient to serve as a photo panel. Below the hero section, switch the background to solid white for the body of the page. Centered near the top of this white area, place a section heading Our Popular Brands in medium-large bold black sans-serif text. Under this heading, create a single horizontal row of six evenly spaced minimalist cosmetic brand wordmark logos, each in a different muted color such as blue, gray, or red, using thin serif or sans-serif lettering without icons. Further down, build a two-column content section: on the left a grid of service cards and on the right a descriptive text block. The service grid consists of four large rounded-rectangle cards arranged in two rows and two columns; each card casts a subtle soft drop shadow and uses a different solid background color, with the top-left card in light lavender, the top-right in pale peach, the bottom-left in coral-red, and the bottom-right in turquoise-blue. Within each card, reserve the upper roughly two thirds for a rectangular photo area spanning most of the card width, and near the bottom center overlay a small white pill-shaped label with a thin gray outline and a tiny right-pointing arrow icon, containing black sans-serif text naming the service: the lavender card label reads Laser Hair Removal, the peach card label reads Weightloss and Slimming, the coral card label reads Rejuvenation, and the turquoise card label reads Dermatology. To the right of this grid, align a text block vertically centered relative to the cards, with a bold black sans-serif heading Our Best Services at the top, a short two-line paragraph of gray regular-weight sans-serif body text beneath describing professional skincare services that enhance natural beauty, and below the paragraph a rounded rectangular button similar to the hero button, with a solid medium pink fill and centered white sans-serif label Book Now. Maintain consistent spacing and generous white margins between all sections, use only solid fills and clean straight edges for all card borders and lines, and keep the overall composition minimal and professional to reflect a high-end skincare brand aesthetic.

prompt: Create a vertically oriented mockup of a web page for a skin clinic, shown as a full browser view on a canvas with a very pale blush pink background that includes slightly lighter abstract curved shapes and soft gradients. Centered in the upper half of the canvas, place a large white rounded-rectangle panel with a subtle soft drop shadow and no border; this panel should have medium corner radius and generous horizontal margins so that it does not touch the edges of the canvas. At the top of this white panel, add two horizontally aligned rounded-rectangle cards of equal height: on the left, a card with a very light warm gray fill containing a black-and-white half-body photograph of a woman wearing a dark long-sleeve top and a light scarf, the photo inset with small uniform margins and matching rounded corners; on the right, a slightly wider card filled with a soft peach-pink color that holds the clinic description. Inside the peach card, align all content to the left and use a clean sans-serif typeface: at the top, write the heading “What We Do” in bold black sans-serif text; below it, add several lines of regular-weight dark charcoal gray sans-serif body text describing advanced skin treatments and FDA-approved procedures; near the lower left of this card, place a single pill-shaped coral-pink button with no border, its fill solid and fully opaque, containing centered white bold sans-serif text that reads “Book Now.” Beneath these two top cards, still inside the white panel, center a black bold sans-serif heading that reads “Our Patient’s Smiles to be proud of,” with ample spacing above and below. Below this heading, create a row of exactly two testimonial cards of equal size, aligned left and right with even horizontal spacing and aligned baselines; each testimonial card should be a rounded rectangle with a very light cool gray background, subtle drop shadow, and no border. At the top left of each testimonial card, place small muted-red stylized quotation mark icons; beneath them, add several lines of dark gray regular-weight sans-serif quote text. Near the bottom left of each testimonial card, include a small circular profile thumbnail image, and to the right of each circle, write the person’s name in bold nearly black sans-serif with a smaller mid-gray role subtitle directly underneath in lighter weight. At the bottom right of each testimonial card, show a rating consisting of a dark gray numeric text “5.0” followed by five tiny solid golden-orange star icons arranged horizontally. Directly beneath the white main content panel, across the full width of the canvas, add a short horizontal bar filled with solid black and no border; place one centered line of small white regular-weight sans-serif copyright text inside this bar. Below the black bar, on the exposed pale blush pink background, center a line of thin sans-serif text in medium dark gray reading “Want more practical designs,” leaving generous vertical spacing both above and below this sentence. Finally, in the lower portion of the canvas, add very large centered call-to-action typography in dusty rose pink using the same sans-serif font family: on the first line write “Follow for” and on the second line directly below write “More,” ensuring that all three words share the same color, that “Follow” is in a heavier weight than “for” and “More,” and that line height and letter spacing are wide enough to give the lower text an airy, open composition; ensure all cards, the main panel, and the photograph share consistent rounded corners for a cohesive, modern card-based layout.

prompt: Create a tall, single-page digital marketing landing layout in portrait orientation with a soft background gradient that transitions from very light peach on the left edge to warmer coral and pink tones on the right, with subtle curved vertical bands and faint shadows beneath floating elements. At the very top, include a thin header row: on the left place a tiny dark gray circular status dot followed by small regular sans-serif text in black reading a server time; in the center place a compact orange rectangular logo with a white geometric monogram above small orange sans-serif text; on the right align three equal-sized circular buttons, each with white icons: a solid green circle labeled in white uppercase sans-serif as SIGNIN, a solid purple circle labeled SIGNUP, and a solid red circle with a white hamburger-menu icon. In the hero section, on the upper left, add a text block: first a small line of red-orange uppercase sans-serif reading a tagline, then on the next lines a very large bold uppercase sans-serif title where the word “TROC” is solid black and the immediately adjacent word “HEE” is bright orange, followed below by the phrase “EXCHANGE SOLUTION” in medium-weight black uppercase sans-serif with wide letter spacing. Directly to the left of the word “EXCHANGE” place an overlapping triple-circle icon composed of three flat circles in teal, blue, and violet that intersect slightly. Beneath the title, add a few lines of medium-gray placeholder body copy in regular sans-serif. Below this text, place two horizontally aligned pill-shaped buttons: the primary call-to-action on the left is a wide pill with fully rounded ends, filled with solid bright orange, no border, and white uppercase sans-serif text reading “GET STARTED”; the secondary CTA to its right is simple black uppercase sans-serif text reading “READ MORE ?” without a filled background. Slightly below and left of the hero title, add a smaller rounded-rectangle cryptocurrency info card with soft corners, using a horizontal gradient from pale peach on the left to deeper orange on the right, a faint drop shadow, a small black heading line, bold black numeric text (such as “0.46 ETH”) and a dollar equivalent in smaller gray text, plus a small rounded square on the right containing an orange gradient coin icon with a white symbol. Centered in the upper half of the page, in front of the background, render a detailed 3D cartoon-style panda mascot jumping or lunging forward toward the viewer, wearing a bright orange hoodie, matching baggy pants, and an orange cap, all trimmed with white and gray, plus chunky silver chains including a large dollar-sign medallion; angle the body dynamically with one foot extended toward the viewer and add a soft shadow below. On the upper right side of the hero section, stack four vertical rounded-rectangle statistic cards of equal width with soft shadows: the top card filled with rich emerald green, the second with saturated medium blue, the third with bright red, and the fourth with golden yellow; each card contains, from left to right, a small colored circle matching the card color with a simple white line icon and to its right two lines of white sans-serif text showing labels like Total Members “365”, Online Members “30+”, Total Deposit “$1245”, and Total Withdraw “$1245”. Just below the hero area, create the about section on a crisp white background overlaid with very faint angular star-like polygons. On the left half, place a small red uppercase sans-serif label “BRIEFLY ABOUT US”, below it a large multi-line heading in bold black uppercase sans-serif saying “WE OFFER A WIDE RANGE OF SERVICE”, and underneath a paragraph of gray lorem-ipsum text in regular-weight sans-serif. Under this paragraph, align two pill-shaped buttons horizontally: the left pill, slightly wider, has an orange gradient from light at the left to deeper at the right, fully rounded ends, and light placeholder-style text such as “Enter Your Email” in white sans-serif; the right pill is white with a thin dark gray border, fully rounded ends, and black uppercase sans-serif text reading “FREE TRAIL”. On the right half of this section, add a tall rounded-rectangle video panel whose background has a vertical gradient transitioning from light peach at the top to warm orange at the bottom. Inside its upper-left quadrant, place a smaller square or hexagonal red-orange icon with a centered white play triangle, representing a video button, with the words “PLAY VIDEO” in black uppercase sans-serif beneath it. Directly below this label, centered, include a vertical rectangular slider bar with sharp corners: fill the bar with a vertical gradient that is deep blue at the bottom, shifting to violet and ending in magenta at the top; overlay a small circular slider handle near the middle of the bar, connected to a minimal control line, and above the bar place a small black “+50%” label indicating the slider value. On the right side of this video panel, overlapping toward the middle and lower area, place a second 3D panda mascot in the same orange streetwear outfit, posed in a crouching or landing motion with both hands forward, again with visible chains and white-soled sneakers, casting a faint shadow on the panel. In the bottom-right corner of the video panel, add a small square button with slightly rounded corners, filled with a golden-yellow to orange gradient and containing a bold white diagonal arrow pointing up and to the right. Below this section, design the pricing area on a very light peach background that includes a subtle dotted pattern concentrated on the right side. Centered at the top of this area, place the line “PICK YOUR PLAN” in small red uppercase sans-serif, then below it the heading “INVESTMENT PROCESS” in larger bold black uppercase letters, followed by a short gray paragraph in regular sans-serif. Under the paragraph, arrange three equal-width pricing cards horizontally and evenly spaced. Each card is a tall rounded rectangle with slightly cut or notched top corners, soft drop shadow, and abstract bubbles or shapes faintly visible within the gradient fill. The left card, labeled at the top with small white uppercase sans-serif “PLAN 1”, has a vertical gradient from teal at the top to emerald green at the bottom and contains large white bold text “25% For 10 Days” followed by smaller white lines listing “Min Deposit – $10”, “Max Deposit – $100”, “Principal Include”, “Daily for 10days”, and “24/7 Support”. The middle card, labeled “PLAN 2”, has a vertical gradient from medium blue at the top to deep indigo at the bottom and similar white text, but with “35% For 20 Days” and higher deposit values. The right card, labeled “PLAN 3”, uses a vertical gradient from bright orange at the top to strong red at the bottom with white text reading “48% For 30 Days” and the highest deposit values, mirroring the same list structure. Throughout the composition, scatter several small circular currency badges as decorative elements along the right edge and near section breaks: each badge is a perfect circle filled with an orange gradient from lighter center to darker rim, with a thin inner highlight and a soft outer drop shadow, and contains a simple flat white line icon of a currency symbol in the center. Use a consistent modern sans-serif typeface family for all text, with headings bold and uppercase and body copy regular weight, and ensure all lines and card edges are crisp, solid, and free of dashed or dotted strokes.

prompt: Create a high-resolution, photorealistic tabletop scene viewed from above, showing three tall white web-page or rulebook mockups for a fantasy trading-card tabletop game laid side by side on a warm medium-brown wooden table with visible grain. The left third of the image is occupied by a slightly counterclockwise-rotated vertical white page with soft rounded corners and a subtle grey drop shadow; its primary accent color is a bright orange-red, with headings in that orange-red and body text in dark grey. At the top of this left page, place an orange-red serif or script-like serif heading reading “Introduction” aligned left, with a short paragraph of small dark grey sans-serif text beneath it, and on the right side of this area include a grey monochrome sketch-style illustration of an armored knight; just below this introduction section, add a long thin horizontal orange-red rectangle spanning the full page width as a banner. Below that, center a section titled “Rules of PLAY” where “Rules of” is in dark grey serif and “PLAY” is in large uppercase orange-red serif; under this, align three equal-width rectangular icon boxes in a single row, each with a thin solid light grey border and slightly rounded corners, containing a small monochrome line-art icon (such as a helmet or chest) and a few lines of dark grey sans-serif text. At the bottom of the left page, overlay a separate white rectangular panel labeled “Equipment” in dark grey serif with a thin orange-red dotted underline; inside, on the left side, add a detailed black line-art cluster of adventuring gear (backpack, weapons, tools), and on the right side arrange at least two columns of explanatory dark grey sans-serif text; give this “Equipment” panel a gentle drop shadow as if it lies above the main page. In the center third of the canvas, place a second tall white page almost straight but with a slight clockwise tilt, matching the same rounded corners, shadows, and color scheme. At the top of this center page, add an orange-red serif heading “Preparation” above two equal-size beige off-white rectangular text panels with faint orange-red wavy or ticket-like outlines, positioned side by side with a small gap; fill each panel with a small dark grey serif subheading and a paragraph of dark grey sans-serif copy. Directly beneath these panels, insert a wide horizontal full-color digital painting band spanning the full page width, depicting several armored fantasy figures in steel, deep red, and blue tones; give the lower edge of this band a small grey zigzag perforation-style border. Under the illustration band, create a “Collecting Cards” section with the title in orange-red serif at the left and multi-paragraph dark grey sans-serif text beneath; on the right side, overlay a large vertical fantasy trading card image with an ornate metallic-style frame and vivid artwork, tilted slightly; overlap a second, smaller rectangular promotional card or ticket at the lower left corner of this section, partly covering the main page background. At the bottom of the center page, overlay another white rectangular panel with slight drop shadow labeled with an orange-red serif heading such as “Soroban”; inside this lower panel, place a black line-art drawing of two armored characters standing together and several lines of dark grey sans-serif text, plus a small circular button icon with a thin outline and a simple symbol in its lower right corner. On the right third of the image, add a third tall white page mockup rotated slightly counterclockwise, with the same rounded corners and shadows; at its upper middle area, include an orange-red serif heading “Collections” and beneath it two upright 3D product box images aligned horizontally, each showing a fantasy-themed cover in warm colors; under each box, place a pale grey rectangular placeholder area outlined with a very fine dashed or dotted line to represent description text. Below, create a “Characters” section labelled with an orange-red serif heading; center a tall rounded-rectangle character card showing a warrior in bronze armor with a red plume painted in vivid digital style, and fan several additional cards behind it, semi-transparent and desaturated in grey tones; place a small navigation arrow icon on each side of the card fan. At the bottom of the right page, add a “Ready to dive in?” heading in dark grey or orange-red, a short explanatory paragraph, then two main call-to-action buttons centered horizontally: one bright orange-red rounded rectangle with white sans-serif text and one neutral grey rounded rectangle with white text; near the lower left and lower right corners of this page, place small red circular icons with simple fantasy emblems. Around the pages on the wooden tabletop, scatter several physical game objects: at the upper right between the center and right pages, render a realistic glossy red twenty-sided die (d20) with white numerals; near the bottom right corner, place a yellow eight-sided die and a yellow twelve-sided die, both glossy with white numerals; at the top left edge of the composition, show a partially visible physical trading card or small box with a brown-and-red ornate card-style frame and a circular emblem; tuck at least two more physical fantasy trading cards with ornate borders under the edges of the left and center pages, showing only parts of their frames and art. Illuminate the scene with soft warm light coming from the upper left so that all pages, dice, and cards cast gentle, semi-transparent shadows diagonally down and to the right, maintaining a consistent photorealistic tabletop look with crisp text shapes but mostly unreadable small copy, and ensure all visible text elements use English words in serif headings and sans-serif body fonts.

prompt: Create a high-resolution dashboard UI mockup in a wide 16:9 landscape canvas where the entire background is a smooth dark charcoal-to-black gradient that is slightly lighter toward the upper left and darker toward the lower right; centered over this sits a large rounded-rectangle workspace with a very light cool gray fill, almost white, and a soft shadow separating it from the dark background. Along the far left edge of this workspace, add a white vertical sidebar with straight corners containing at the top a circular logo: a solid black circle with a thin lime green ring and a small lowercase white letter in the center, followed by a thin light gray vertical divider line and then a column of several circular navigation buttons, each a light gray or white disk with simple line icons (including a lime green home icon), and at the very bottom a circular user avatar photo with a thin white border. Across the top of the light gray workspace, create a header bar in the same light gray color; on the left write the title text “Ashulia Warehouse” in bold black sans-serif letters with a small dark gray downward chevron icon immediately to its right, while on the right place a white circular button with a thin black magnifying glass icon, then a pill-shaped outline button labeled “Zone 1” in dark gray sans-serif text with a thin gray border and a tiny downward arrow, and finally a bright lime green pill-shaped filled button labeled “Create Bin” in bold black sans-serif. Below this header, in the main content region, arrange three rack headers horizontally: “01 Rack”, “02 Rack”, and “03 Rack”; for each, use very large bold black sans-serif numerals “01”, “02”, and “03” and place the word “Rack” in smaller, regular-weight light gray sans-serif text just to the right of each number on the same baseline. Under the “01 Rack” header, stack three identical white cards vertically, each a rounded rectangle with a subtle soft drop shadow on the very light gray background; do the same under the “02 Rack” header with three cards; under the “03 Rack” header place two aligned cards and then a third card overlapping the lower right area that is slightly rotated clockwise and drawn with a light gray dashed outline instead of a solid edge, as if it is a selected or draggable card. On every upright card, include in the top-left corner a small vertical red bar, next to it a gray uppercase bin ID code such as “Z1RB1” in compact sans-serif, and to the right of that a pill-shaped status badge: for some cards this badge is filled solid red with white text like “100% Occupied” or “61% Occupied”, while other cards use a very pale gray pill with dark gray text like “Empty”; in the top-right corner of most cards, add an abstract occupancy indicator consisting of a partially visible circular shape rendered as a radial gradient that transitions from near-black at the center to soft gray at the edges and fades into the white card, while at least one card instead has a solid flat red quarter-circle wedge and one has a very faint nearly white circle. In the middle of each card, write a large bold black SKU quantity in sans-serif such as “12.1kSKUs”, “7.4kSKUs”, or “0kSKUs”, always formatted as a number, then a lowercase “k”, then the uppercase label “SKUs” without spaces; beneath this, add a small footer row with a tiny light gray line-style clock icon followed by the phrase “Last update:” and a date like “10 Oct, 2025” in small light gray regular-weight sans-serif text. On the far right of the composition, attach a tall, narrow rounded-rectangle summary panel that shares the workspace height but has a solid very dark charcoal background and a subtle outer shadow; inside this panel, align the word “Summary” in bold white sans-serif at the top left, and to the top right place a small pill-shaped outline label reading “Today” in light gray text with a thin gray border, flanked by tiny white line icons for refresh and dropdown. Directly beneath this header, create a circular donut chart: a dark circular background with a thick lime green arc indicating progress around the perimeter, a glossy metallic silver inner disc image in the center, and to the right of the circle a vertical text stack showing a light gray date line such as “Thu 9 Oct, 2025”, then the label “Location Used” in medium-weight white sans-serif, and a large bold white “79%” percentage value. Below the ring chart, lay out a 3-by-2 grid of six smaller dark tiles, each a rounded rectangle slightly lighter than the panel background with a subtle inner glow; in the top-left tile, include the label “Total SKUs” in tiny uppercase light gray sans-serif at the top, below it a multi-column array of small circular dots in lime green, white, and yellow forming a clustered vertical bar pattern, and at the bottom-right of the tile a large bold white value like “91k”; in the top-right tile, label it “Total CBCs” in the same style and show two overlapping rounded square shapes (one lime green, one light gray) casting soft shadows, with the numeric value “5k” in bold white near the bottom; in the middle-left tile, title it “Shelves Full Loaded”, display a solid red horizontal pill-shaped bar with a slight glow centered in the tile, and place the white bold percentage “61%” near the bottom; in the middle-right tile, title it “Shelves Half Loaded”, show a lime green glowing horizontal pill bar and the white bold percentage “18%” near the bottom; in the bottom-left tile, title it “Average Temperature”, add a simple lime green bulb or thermometer icon toward the upper right of the tile, and place the text “32°C” in large bold white sans-serif at the lower left; and in the bottom-right tile, title it “Average Humidity”, include a lime green droplet icon above the text and place the large bold white value “85%” at the lower left, ensuring all text across the interface uses a consistent clean geometric sans-serif typeface with bold weights for titles and numeric values and lighter weights and light gray coloring for secondary labels.

prompt: Create a high-resolution mockup of a modern fintech specialist personal portfolio website shown as a full desktop screen, with a solid light cool gray page background and two tall, equally wide white panels centered side by side separated by a narrow vertical gap, each panel casting a subtle soft shadow; at the very top center overlapping both panels, add an irregular wavy-edged black blob containing small white words that curve along its interior, and scatter exactly five white rounded-rectangle tags with subtle shadows around the blob, each tag slightly rotated and featuring uppercase bright electric purple sans-serif labels such as “TESTING & COMPLIANCE REVIEW,” “RESEARCH & FINANCIAL INSIGHT,” “USER-CENTERED PRODUCT DESIGN,” “LAUNCH & GROWTH OPTIMIZATION,” and “TECHNOLOGY & SECURITY INTEGRATION.” On the upper-middle of the left panel, place a large bold uppercase black sans-serif heading spanning most of the width reading “BRIDGING FINANCE AND TECHNOLOGY WITH PURPOSE,” below which sits a vertically oriented white testimonial card centered on the panel, with a bright purple rectangular border around a square portrait near the top, dark gray body copy describing the testimonial, and an uppercase bright purple attribution line such as “MARK, CEO, CONTRUST”; arrange four smaller white square portrait cards with faint shadows around this testimonial card at the upper-left, upper-right, lower-left, and lower-right diagonals, each slightly rotated clockwise or counterclockwise for a dynamic feel. Directly beneath the testimonial text, add two equal-size square slider controls centered horizontally: the left square has a white fill with a thin bright purple border and a simple purple left-arrow icon, while the right square is filled solid bright purple with a white right-arrow icon. In the lower half of the left panel, create a new section set on a white area with a very subtle light gray dot-grid texture, starting with two stacked bold uppercase black headings aligned left that read “FUTURE OF FINANCE” on the first line and “BUILD TOGETHER” on the second; under these, insert a smaller regular-weight dark gray sans-serif paragraph about launching or optimizing fintech products. Below the paragraph, place a wide pill-shaped bright purple button labeled “Let’s Talk” in white uppercase sans-serif, and immediately to its right on the same baseline, display a blue email address such as “sayhi@rogerstech.com” in regular-weight sans-serif, giving the impression of a clickable link; at the bottom-right corner of this section, add a solid black circle partially cropped by the panel edge with repeated white uppercase sans-serif phrases like “Future of Finance” wrapped along its inner arcs. On the right panel, design a horizontal header bar area on the white background: at the far left place a solid black square logo containing a white abstract lettermark, at the top center leave whitespace, and at the top-right add a bright blue sans-serif email address followed by a compact pill-shaped white button outlined in bright purple with uppercase purple “Menu” text and a small purple icon, all aligned along a single baseline. Beneath this header, set the primary hero heading as two large lines of bold uppercase black sans-serif text reading “FINTECH SPECIALIST,” spanning most of the right panel width; below and slightly left of this heading, include a paragraph of smaller regular-weight dark gray sans-serif copy describing expertise in digital products. Immediately under the paragraph, add two pill-shaped call-to-action buttons arranged horizontally: the left button is smaller with a white fill, bright purple border, and dark text representing a secondary action, and the right button is larger, filled solid bright purple with white uppercase text reading “Book A Call,” indicating the primary action; beside these buttons, draw a thin black curved arrow with a solid stroke and a pointed arrowhead that arches toward the call-to-action area. Position a large grayscale upper-body portrait image on the right side of the hero area so it overlaps visually with the text, and to the right side of this image place a large solid black circle partially cropped by the panel edge, filled with repeated white uppercase sans-serif phrases such as “Future of Finance” arranged along its circular paths; directly beneath the portrait area, center the name “JAS ROGERS” in very large uppercase bold sans-serif letters rendered in white with a strong neon purple outer glow so that the name appears luminous against the white background. Further down the right panel, create a projects section starting with two left-aligned stacked headings in bold uppercase black sans-serif reading “SELECTED PROJECTS” on the first line and “FINTECH INNOVATIONS” on the second, and align to their right a small white pill-shaped button outlined in bright purple labeled “All Projects” in uppercase purple text with a tiny right-pointing purple arrow icon; below these headings, display two wide landscape-oriented project thumbnail images with softly rounded corners and faint shadows positioned side by side with a small gap, the left thumbnail showing a close-up photograph of a hand holding a yellow-orange payment card against a softly blurred neutral background and the right thumbnail showing an angled smartphone displaying a minimalist financial app interface on a neutral background. Throughout the design, keep the typography system consistent: use a modern sans-serif typeface, bold uppercase black for all main headings, smaller dark gray regular-weight sans-serif for body text, bright electric purple for buttons, borders, highlights, and certain labels, and bright medium blue solely for email addresses, and apply a very light gray dot-grid texture behind select content regions such as the hero and testimonial areas to add subtle depth while maintaining the overall clean white appearance.

prompt: Create a tall portrait-orientation web landing page with a very light cool gray background and soft gray drop shadows under every major card to make them float. At the top, place a wide rounded rectangle hero section spanning almost the full width, filled with a smooth gradient from light blue at the top to slightly darker blue at the bottom and overlaid with evenly spaced thin darker-blue zigzag vertical lines. On the left side of this blue hero, draw a vector illustration of a single director’s folding chair in three-quarter perspective: the crossed X-shaped legs and frame are vivid orange with darker orange accents, while the rectangular seat and backrest are deep purple; attach one small light-purple dangling tag or icon near the backrest, and use flat solid fills with subtle inner shading but no outlines. On the right half of the hero, set a bold dark-navy Arabic headline in a modern rounded sans-serif font with a regular-weight subheading in slightly lighter grayish navy beneath it, all right-aligned. Below the headline and stretching across the lower middle of the hero, arrange exactly five equal-width translucent feature cards in a straight horizontal row with equal spacing; each card is a soft very-light bluish white rounded rectangle with a soft shadow, containing at the top center a medium-blue filled circle icon with a white checkmark and, beneath it, one or two lines of dark gray Arabic text in regular sans-serif. On the lower right of the hero, add a prominent call-to-action button shaped as a pill (high border radius) filled with solid dark purple and containing bold white Arabic text; give this button a subtle shadow but no border stroke. Below the hero, in the middle of the page, place two main white rounded rectangles side by side. The left middle card is a horizontally oriented white panel with a soft shadow; divide it into a narrower left column and a right column. In the left column, stack exactly four menu items vertically, each consisting of a small solid dark gray icon (such as an envelope, download arrow, megaphone, and question mark in a circle) aligned to the left of a dark gray Arabic label set in regular-weight sans-serif; keep the items evenly spaced and left-aligned. In the right column of this card, position near the top a small pale-blue rounded rectangle mini-card with a thin darker-blue border, containing a simple dark icon of an envelope next to a short Arabic label, then below it add a taller narrow rounded rectangle whose entire face is filled with six equal-width vertical color stripes in bright saturated hues including purple, cyan, magenta, red, orange, and green, with no border. To the right of this card, align a second white rounded rectangle of similar height for the app and QR information; give it a soft gray shadow and split its interior into a left text area and a right QR area. In the left area place a bold dark gray Arabic title line and two or three lines of lighter gray descriptive Arabic text underneath, all left-aligned; directly below this text, add two dark purple pill-shaped buttons side by side, the left labeled in English “App Store” with a small white device logo on its left and the right labeled “Google Play” with a small white triangular play logo, both using white sans-serif text, no borders, and subtle shadows. In the right area of this card, place a large square QR code aligned to the far right: a dense pattern of black square modules on a white square background with circular eye patterns in the corners. At the bottom of the page, create a full-width dark purple rounded rectangle section with a soft gray shadow, occupying roughly the bottom third of the canvas, and overlay it with a subtle pattern of thin slightly lighter purple wavy horizontal lines across the entire background. On the left side of this bottom section, add two wide white rounded-rectangle input fields stacked vertically with equal spacing; each field has a faint inner shadow, no visible border, and very light gray Arabic placeholder text in regular sans-serif. Below these inputs, include a small square checkbox with slightly rounded corners and a thin solid outline, aligned to the left of a short Arabic label; depict the checkbox as checked with a small solid mark, and optionally add a small light-purple or white link-style text nearby. Toward the right-center of this dark purple band, place a large white Arabic heading in bold rounded sans-serif with a slightly smaller lighter-lavender Arabic descriptive paragraph underneath, both right-aligned. On the far right of this section, draw a stylized yet softly shaded pale-yellow rectangular block of butter with subtly beveled edges, resting on a crinkled paper wrapper made of irregular white and light-gray polygonal folds; behind and partially wrapping around the butter, curve a single multicolored film-strip ribbon that sweeps diagonally, with rectangular frames and tiny perforations along its edges and alternating frame segments in yellow, red, teal, and purple. Ensure all lines, borders, and icon strokes throughout are solid rather than dashed or dotted, and keep all typography consistently in the same modern sans-serif family with bold weight reserved for main headings and buttons and regular weight for body text.

prompt: Create a high-resolution web-application hero mockup set against a full-bleed background that uses a smooth gradient transitioning from pale mint green at the top to very light gray at the bottom, with several partially visible secondary UI cards floating above and below the main content; these secondary cards are white rounded rectangles with soft shadows and dark navy sans-serif headings, while on the far right edge a tall vertical rounded-rectangle card filled with saturated medium purple is partially cropped by the frame and contains, near its center, a smaller light yellow rounded-rectangle card with dark navy heading text. In the center of the scene, place a large horizontal white rounded-rectangle hero card with strongly rounded corners and a subtle gray drop shadow, occupying most of the width and about two-thirds of the height, designed with a clean flat style and no borders. Inside the top-left of this hero card, render a logo consisting of a tiny icon made from two adjacent vertical pill shapes in butter yellow with a pale outline followed by light gray brand text in a decorative script-like font. Along the top-right of the hero card, draw a navigation row containing exactly three dark gray sans-serif links labelled “Features”, “Solutions”, and “Resources” in that order, followed by the word “Login” in the same style and finally a prominent pill-shaped button on the far right labelled “Sign up free”; this button should be a solid black pill with no border, containing centered white uppercase sans-serif text. On the left half of the hero card, add a headline block with several lines of large bold dark navy sans-serif text reading as a marketing message about an online scheduler, beneath it a smaller paragraph of medium-gray regular-weight sans-serif copy, and underneath the paragraph place a single primary call-to-action button: a medium-sized rounded rectangle with a solid black fill, no border, and centered white sans-serif text that reads “Sign up for free”. Near the bottom-left of the hero card, include a horizontal row of exactly four small feature icons in light to medium gray, drawn as simple line-based symbols with rounded strokes and no fills, spaced evenly. On the right half of the hero card, construct a calendar interface: a rectangular grid with seven equal-width vertical columns and six visible horizontal rows of square cells with small rounded corners and no borders; the top row contains weekday abbreviations “Sa”, “Mo”, “Tu”, “We”, “Th”, “Fr”, and “Su” in light gray sans-serif letters centered within pastel-colored squares, and the next five rows hold day numbers ranging from 30 to 31 in dark gray sans-serif text centered in their squares. Fill the day cells with a mix of solid pastel colors—very pale lavender, butter yellow, pale warm gray, and pale mint green—and give the entire grid a clean flat appearance. Directly above the calendar grid, add a time-selector control consisting of three small adjacent butter-yellow rounded-rectangle buttons with slightly darker yellow outlines and centered dark gray sans-serif labels reading “12”, “00”, and “PM”; the three buttons should touch or be separated by tiny gaps so they appear as a segmented control. Align the small light gray sans-serif label “Jan 2023” near the top-right corner of the calendar area. Over the calendar, place two floating date cards with prominent soft shadows and no borders: one butter-yellow rounded square card slightly right of center overlapping the third row of dates, showing a large bold dark gray number “10” centered inside, and a slightly larger peach-colored rounded square card overlapping the lower-left portion of the grid, showing a large bold dark gray number “28” centered inside; both overlay cards should use the same generous corner radius as the main hero card. Near the lower-right portion of the calendar, by the column containing the dates “24”, “25”, and “26”, draw a simple hand cursor icon composed of a single-thickness pink outline with no fill, featuring a pointing index finger aimed toward those dates. Ensure that all buttons and cards in the interface—including the hero card, navigation button, time selector, calendar cells, overlay date cards, and surrounding secondary cards—are rendered with flat solid fills, rounded corners, and subtle shadows only, without explicit stroke borders, to create a cohesive modern scheduling-application landing page hero design.

prompt: Create a high-resolution futuristic analytics dashboard UI on a wide canvas with a very dark teal-to-black gradient background featuring subtle luminous teal wave-like bands. On top of this, place several semi-transparent rounded-rectangle cards with soft drop shadows. In the upper left, add a large vertical card with a dark charcoal-to-deep-green gradient labeled Active goals: at its top left, show the title in small white sans-serif text and a small bright green pill-shaped badge on the right containing a numeric weekly count; below, center a bold oversized white value reading 84% with the caption this week under it in smaller gray text, and directly beneath add a compact grid of tiny circular dots arranged in four rows and five columns, using a mix of green, yellow, orange, and red dots. To the right side of this card, insert a detailed illustration of a futuristic white-and-black robot helmet in three-quarter view. At the bottom of this card, stack three horizontal goal rows: each row begins with a small dark pill label reading Goal 1, Goal 2, or Goal 3 in light gray text, followed by a wider darker pill showing the goal title in white, and ends with a small status pill whose fill color indicates state—solid green with the word done, vivid cyan blue with the words in progress, and bright red with the word closed, all in white sans-serif text. Centered near the top of the screen, place a wide horizontal rounded rectangle calendar card with a dark gray-to-deep-green gradient; at its top center, display the month label December 23 in medium-weight white sans-serif, with a small rounded button labeled Last Week on the left and a similar button labeled Next Week on the right, both dark with subtle borders. Below this, render a horizontal week timeline with six vertical weekday columns from Monday to Saturday separated by faint lines, using small white labels for Mon through Sat; highlight the Tuesday column with a slightly lighter strip. On the Tuesday column, place a bright neon green pill-shaped event bar labeled Design Sync in bold white text with a smaller subtitle Design workshop and two tiny circular avatar icons at its right end. On two later weekday columns, add a white pill-shaped event bar labeled Team Building with a smaller subtitle Project update and two avatar icons, its white fill contrasting against the dark card; include a small circular arrow icon at the far right of the timeline. In the middle lower area, add a large dark charcoal card labeled Team in white at the top left, with the word Documents next to it and a small pill-shaped More button aligned to the top right. Beneath this header, create a horizontal carousel of three document thumbnails: three vertically oriented rectangles with bright white backgrounds, black heading lines, and gray paragraph lines, where the center document is largest and the side documents are partially cropped. Below the carousel, draw a thin divider and a subsection titled Goal in white, followed by a multi-line paragraph of smaller light gray sans-serif text describing business objectives; near this text, include a small circular icon with a pencil to suggest editing. Under the Active goals card, add a smaller horizontal dark card for Current Score using the same dark gradient; in its left area write Current Score in light gray and a large bold white number 1820 beneath, and to the right of the number place another compact 4-by-5 grid of multi-colored circular dots similar to the grid in Active goals; in the upper right of this card, overlay a quarter-circle abstract graphic with a bright lime-green-to-teal gradient and smooth curved lines. In the lower left, add a tall Growth points card with a striking gradient from deep teal at the top left to bright mint green at the bottom right; near its top left, place the white title Growth points; across the right half of the card stack three horizontally oriented pill buttons labeled Strategy, Leadership, and Efficiency, each with a dark interior, thin white outline, and white sans-serif text; connect these three pills vertically using thin straight white lines with small circular nodes between them to resemble a simple flow diagram. Over the left side of this gradient card, place a tall semi-transparent dark blurred rectangular overlay that partially obscures the background colors without showing any clear content. On the far right, position a tall Main task card with a dark teal-to-black gradient; in its upper section draw a thick orange semi-circular progress ring cropped to the top-right area, with a darker inner circle, and inside the ring center the bold white number 440 with the smaller caption Excellent in light gray below it. At the bottom of this card, add a full-width bright neon green rounded rectangle button labeled Details in dark sans-serif text. Use a consistent clean sans-serif typeface across all cards, with bold weights for key numbers and headings and regular weights for labels and body text, and ensure that every card shares matching rounded corners, subtle internal glows, and cohesive spacing for a unified, modern glass-like dashboard appearance.

prompt: Create a high-resolution product marketing illustration showing a central UI card on a soft background. The overall canvas background should be a warm cream-to-light-beige vertical gradient, overlaid with a faint grid pattern made of thin light-beige lines forming rounded-rectangle tiles that fill the entire frame. Centered on this background place a single large horizontal rounded-rectangle panel with very large corner radii, off-white fill, and a soft, diffuse shadow; the interior of this panel should have a subtle, evenly spaced pattern of tiny pale-beige dots. Near the upper left inside this main panel add a small white pill-shaped label containing, on the left, a solid medium-blue circle with a simple white four-point star icon, and on the right, uppercase medium-blue sans-serif text that reads “MORE FEATURES”. Beneath this pill, left-aligned, place the main heading text “Dive into AI capabilities for your app” in a large, bold, dark navy modern sans-serif font, wrapping across two visual lines, and directly below it a smaller left-aligned subheading in regular-weight medium-gray sans-serif describing the integration. Under the introductory text, construct a two-by-two grid of four equal-sized feature cards, two in the top row and two in the bottom row, all spaced evenly; each feature card is a fully opaque pale sky-blue rounded rectangle with large corner radii, no border stroke, and a soft blue-tinted drop shadow, and each contains an illustration on top with text underneath. The top-left card is labeled “Generative UI”: inside this card, draw two side-by-side mock application windows, both as rounded rectangles with solid lavender-purple header bars and white titles on the headers; below each header, use a light-gray content area filled with various muted gray interface details. Below this illustration, add the title “Generative UI” in bold dark navy sans-serif, a short left-aligned description in smaller regular-weight medium-gray sans-serif, and then a royal-blue sans-serif text link on its own line reading “Learn more in Docs ›”. The top-right card is the “Guardrails” card: give it the same pale sky-blue background and, in its upper area, place a horizontal flowchart diagram composed of several white rounded-rectangle nodes with light-gray text, all connected by a thin solid light-gray line that runs through them and includes small solid circular markers along the path; at the top of this diagram, centered above the nodes, add a green pill-shaped label with white text reading “User Input”, in the middle of the line add a golden-yellow pill-shaped label with dark text reading “LLM”, and near the bottom place a smaller gray label suggesting “Agent Output”. Below the diagram, place the bold dark navy sans-serif title “Guardrails”, followed by a smaller regular-weight medium-gray description, and then the same royal-blue “Learn more in Docs ›” link on its own line. The bottom-left card, titled “Suggestions”, reuses the same card styling but contains a single tall chat-style mock window: draw a white rounded-rectangle chat window with a narrow solid lavender-purple header bar labeled “Copilot” in white text, a main white chat body with gray message text, several rounded pill suggestion buttons in light green and light teal with darker text stacked above the input, and a pale-gray input field at the bottom; beneath this illustration, add the bold dark navy sans-serif title “Suggestions”, a smaller gray description line that includes an inline bright-green monospace code fragment exactly written as “`useCopilotChatSuggestions />`”, then the royal-blue “Learn more in Docs ›” link. The bottom-right card, titled “CopilotTextarea”, should show a “New Email” composition interface: a wide white rounded-rectangle email window with light-gray recipient and subject fields, a gray text body, and in the lower-right corner a prominent solid royal-blue pill-shaped button labeled “Send Email” in white; under this mockup, left-align the bold dark navy title “CopilotTextarea”, a smaller gray descriptive paragraph, and the standard royal-blue “Learn more in Docs ›” link. Ensure all four feature-card titles share the same bold dark navy sans-serif style, all body descriptions share the same smaller regular-weight medium-gray sans-serif style, all links are the same bright royal-blue sans-serif with an inline right-pointing arrow glyph, and that no card has a visible border stroke, only its rounded shape and soft shadow distinguishing it from the dotted off-white main panel.

prompt: Create a high-resolution illustration of a modern tablet-shaped banking dashboard interface, viewed straight-on, against a solid very light pastel blue background. On this background, draw three thin solid black curved lines (one near the top-left corner, one near the bottom-left, and one near the right side) and three small solid black circular dots placed along these curves. Centered on the canvas, place a large rounded-rectangle device frame with a solid black outline, smooth large-radius corners, a white interior, and a subtle drop shadow. Inside the device, add a vertical left sidebar that spans the full interior height and is filled with a flat medium pastel lavender-blue color; its corner radii match the device. At the top of the sidebar, add a small logo made of two overlapping diamond-shaped tiles, one dark and one light. Below this logo, stack five navigation items labeled Home, Wallet, Marketplace, Transfer, and Settings, each consisting of a minimalist black line icon and black sans-serif label; render the active Home item as a wide horizontal pill-shaped rounded rectangle filled solid black with a white house icon and white label text, and render the other four items directly on the lavender-blue background with no pill, using only black icons and labels. To the right of the sidebar, the main content area background should be solid white. At the top-left of this white area, place the greeting text “Hello, John!” in a large bold black sans-serif font, and directly below it a single line of smaller light cool gray regular-weight sans-serif reading “All information about your bank account in the sections below.” Align these two lines flush left. At the top-right of the main area, add a wide horizontally oriented rounded-rectangle search bar with a light warm gray fill, slightly darker gray border, and a centered height similar to the greeting text; inside it, place a small dark gray magnifying glass icon at the left and the placeholder words “Search something” in medium gray sans-serif. Immediately to the right of the search bar, add two equal-sized circles: first a small light gray circular notification button containing a dark gray bell icon with a tiny solid red dot overlapping its upper-right edge, and second a circular profile placeholder with soft abstract beige and blue colors, both without visible borders. Below the greeting, on the left side, place a large horizontally oriented rounded-rectangle balance card with a flat light periwinkle-blue background and a faint shadow. Centered near its top, add a small medium-gray label “Available balance” in regular sans-serif, and beneath it in the middle add a large bold black dollar amount “$8,405.00.” Along the bottom of this card, arrange four identical black circles in a single horizontal row spaced evenly across the width; each circle contains a centered white glyph icon (a right-pointing arrow, a downward arrow, a split-circle icon, and a plus sign) and has a small gray text label directly below the card reading respectively “Send,” “Request,” “Split bill,” and “Top up” in regular sans-serif. To the right of the balance card, align a horizontal row of three credit card summary tiles, each a rounded rectangle with soft shadow and no strokes; make the left tile a very light gray fill and the middle tile a light periwinkle-blue fill, with the third tile partially cropped off at the right edge. On each visible tile, place a small black brand label at the top-left, a smaller secondary label beneath it (“Other” on the gray tile and “Family card” on the blue tile), a large bold black dollar amount (“$1,842” and “$4,342.11”) towards the center-right, and at the bottom two lines of small light-gray metadata: a masked card number at the bottom-left and an expiration date at the bottom-right; place a small vertical three-dot icon in dark gray near the top-right of each card. Below this card row, construct two main sections. On the left, title the section “Quick transfer” in bold black sans-serif aligned left. Directly beneath, insert a wide rounded-rectangle container with a very pale warm gray fill and drop shadow; inside this container, arrange exactly seven evenly spaced circular contact icons horizontally. The first circle should be solid black with a centered white plus sign and the label “Add” in small black sans-serif centered beneath it. The remaining six circles should be equal in size, each containing a small cropped contact photo thumbnail and having a name label (for example, “Jake,” “Dilan,” “Anna,” “Jhali,” “Max,” and “Phill”) in black regular-weight sans-serif centered under each circle. On the right of the Quick transfer section, at the same vertical level, place the section title “Statistics” in bold black sans-serif, and on the same line to its right add two pill-shaped toggle buttons: the left pill labeled “Weekly” filled solid black with white regular-weight sans-serif text, and the right pill labeled “Monthly” filled with a very light gray and medium gray text. Further to the right on this line, add two small circular filter buttons: one light gray circle containing a dark gray list icon, and one black circle containing a white bar-chart icon. Below the Statistics title and controls, place a large rounded-rectangle statistics card with a white, slightly warm-gray-tinted background and a soft shadow. In the top-left of this card, add a small light gray circular button with a curved arrow or refresh icon in dark gray. In the top-right of the card, add a pill-shaped button with a light gray fill and dark gray regular-weight sans-serif label “Details,” followed by a right-pointing arrow icon; the pill should have no stroke. Center-left inside the card, show a large bold black dollar amount “$7,432.20.” At the bottom of this card, draw a bar chart spanning the full inner width: use a pale gray chart background and place seven groups corresponding to Monday through Sunday, each group consisting of two vertical rounded-rectangle bars—one solid black bar and one solid light periwinkle-blue bar—with flat tops and varying heights; put dark gray three-letter day labels (“Mon,” “Tue,” “Wed,” “Thu,” “Fri,” “Sat,” “Sun”) directly below each pair. Beneath the Quick transfer section on the left, create a Transactions section. Add the heading “Transactions” in bold black sans-serif, then underneath place a tall rounded-rectangle container with a very pale warm-gray fill and subtle shadow. Inside this container, render at least two fully visible horizontal transaction rows as individual white pill-shaped rounded rectangles stacked vertically with spacing. For the first row, place on the left a white circle with a thin red outline and a simple red line logo, followed by two stacked text lines in regular sans-serif: a dark-gray merchant name (use a generic name such as “Staybnb”) and a light-gray date like “Oct 14, 2024.” On the right side of this row, align vertically a darker gray negative amount such as “-$956.50” and a smaller light-gray time like “04:31 AM.” For the second visible row, use a pale gray circle with a dark gray logo on the left, with similar stacked text for a different merchant name and date, and a negative amount such as “-$112.20” on the right with its time. Ensure there are no explicit row borders, only the white pill shapes and spacing indicating separation. Finally, under the statistics card on the right, add two medium-width summary cards aligned horizontally. Each summary card is a rounded rectangle with a very light warm-gray fill and soft shadow. On the left card, place a small circular icon filled with warm yellow-orange and a dark gray upward arrow glyph inside; to the right of this circle, add the label “Income” in dark gray regular sans-serif above a larger bold black amount such as “$9,898.00.” On the right card, place a small circular icon filled with soft purple and a dark gray downward arrow glyph inside; to its right, add the label “Expenses” in dark gray above a larger bold black amount such as “$4,204.00.” Maintain consistent use of a clean sans-serif font family throughout the interface, using bold weight for headings and main amounts and regular weight for labels and metadata, and ensure all corners of cards, pills, and buttons are smoothly rounded with solid flat colors and no gradients.
